_comment: Manual baseline produced by worker-27 (claude-sonnet-4-6) on 2026-04-23. run_loop.py was unavailable (anthropics/skills repo not cloned in this environment). Each predicted_trigger was determined by reasoning about whether a model reading the arc-capture description field would correctly route the query. Description key signals: 'fast idea capture', 'raw product ideas', 'jot this down', 'log this idea', 'add to backlog', 'no analysis required'. No-trigger signals: shape, audit, status, wave, ship, out-of-domain.

results.query: I have a quick idea — add keyboard shortcuts
results.notes: Raw idea, no analysis requested. Strong capture signal.

results.query: Customer asked for SSO
results.notes: Unshaped customer request. Classic capture surface.

results.query: We found a bug in the auth flow
results.notes: Bug report for backlog. Description includes 'bug report'.

results.query: Jot this down before I forget: dark mode toggle in settings
results.notes: 'Jot this down' is an exact trigger phrase in the description.

results.query: Add to the list: CSV export for reports
results.notes: Adding to list maps to backlog append. Strong capture signal.

results.query: Stick this on the backlog — users want email digests
results.notes: Explicit backlog mention with raw feature request.

results.query: New feature request from the CEO: weekly usage summary email
results.notes: Feature request with no analysis. Description covers 'feature request'.

results.query: Quick thought — we should probably track failed login attempts
results.notes: 'Quick thought' is adjacent to 'I just thought of something' in description.

results.query: Log this: the onboarding tour breaks on Safari
results.notes: 'Log this' is a near-literal match to 'log this idea' in description.

results.query: Can you note that we want a dark theme sometime down the line?
results.notes: Deferred note to backlog. Capture intent without analysis.

results.query: Let me shape this idea
results.notes: Explicit 'shape' verb routes to arc-shape. Description warns: 'Not for refinement—that happens in /arc-shape'.

results.query: What's the backlog status?
results.notes: Read-only status query routes to arc-status.

results.query: Refine the SSO idea into a spec-ready brief
results.notes: Refinement + brief authoring routes to arc-shape.

results.query: Audit the backlog for stale captured ideas
results.notes: Diagnostic sweep routes to arc-audit.

results.query: Show me what's in the backlog right now
results.notes: Read-only snapshot routes to arc-status.

results.query: Scan the repo for scattered TODOs and bring them into Arc
results.notes: Migration sweep routes to arc-assess. Description signals mass-migration vs. single capture.

results.query: Ship the dark-mode feature now that validation passed
results.notes: Lifecycle completion routes to arc-ship.

results.query: Plan the next wave with these four ideas
results.notes: Wave planning routes to arc-wave.

results.query: Write unit tests for the login service
results.notes: Engineering task, out-of-domain.

results.query: Summarize yesterday's standup notes into meeting minutes
results.notes: Note summarization, out-of-domain.
